name: noxstock-monorepo
description: NoxStock - Monorepo de microservicios y frontend

scripts.start:all: concurrently -k -n AUTH,INV,REP,WEB -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "pnpm --filter noxstock-auth-service dev" "pnpm --filter noxstock-inventory-service dev" "pnpm --filter noxstock-reports-service dev" "pnpm --filter noxstock-frontend dev"
scripts.start:backend: concurrently -k -n AUTH,INV,REP -c blue,green,yellow "pnpm --filter noxstock-auth-service dev" "pnpm --filter noxstock-inventory-service dev" "pnpm --filter noxstock-reports-service dev"
